title: Special evastorejp intros
wikitext:
[]: Special evastore.jp intros?             Quote Post by Asukaner117 » Tue Nov 12, 2013 1:56 pm Hi everybody =) first of all i want to apologize for my not-so-great english, i'm from Germany and as you can guess english is not my native language. And to make things even worse i sucked pretty bad in my english classes back when i was in school. So please be nice I don't know if this question was already answered, sorry if that is the case. Most of you may know that back in 2006 there was a series of pretty cool intros to the evastore page. They looked pretty cool, but sadly i can only finde one of them on YouTube. The Kaworu-themed one: [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x13YTWZv2mU[/url] Now my question is: does anybody know where i can find the other seven intros? Thanks in advance :)

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Tue Nov 12, 2013 2:03 pm Ist doch gutes Englisch. Weiss gar nicht, was du hast. Helfen kann ich aber nicht

And to make things even worse i sucked pretty bad in my english classes back when i was in school. So please be nice I don't know if this question was already answered, sorry if that is the case.
